member.name: M:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IParallelTasksService.BuildBackgroundQueue(System.String)
member.summary: Builds a background queue based on the current platform and DUT (Device Under Test) configuration. Must be call on the DUT 0 during init only.
member.param: The name of the background queue to be created.
member.returns: An instance of representing the appropriate background queue based on the platform and DUT configuration.
member.exception: Thrown when the current DUT index is not 0, as background queue creation is only allowed on DUT 0.

member.name: M:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IParallelTasksService.ParallelAction(System.Action)
member.summary: Returns a prime Action for parallel activity (Task.Factory.StartNew method or TPL).
member.param: An Action delegate to execute asynchronously.

member.name: M:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IParallelTasksService.ParallelAction``1(System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Returns a prime Action for parallel activity (Task.Factory.StartNew method or TPL).
member.typeparam: The type of the result available through the Task.
member.param: An Action delegate to execute asynchronously.

member.name: M:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IParallelTasksService.ParallelFunc``1(System.Func{System.Object,``0})
member.summary: Returns a Prime Func for parallel activity (Task.Factory.StartNew method or TPL).
member.typeparam: The type of the result available through the Task.
member.param: A function delegate that returns the future result to be available through the .

member.name: M:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IParallelTasksService.ParallelFunc``1(System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Returns a Prime Func for parallel activity (Task.Factory.StartNew method or TPL).
member.typeparam: The type of the result available through the Task.
member.param: A function delegate that returns the future result to be available through the .

member.name: T:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IQueue
member.summary: Interface for managing background tasks in the PatConfigService.

member.name: M:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IQueue.Initialize(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes the background queue with the given session context. This *MUST* be called in the respective scope on IntraDut test programs.

member.name: M:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IQueue.QueueTask(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,MPE.MIT.Logging.Context.IContextLogger,System.Action,System.Func{System.String})
member.summary: Queues a task to be executed in the background.
member.param: The task to be executed, represented as a function returning a long.
A functor returning a descriptor of the task when a task fails.

member.name: M:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IQueue.ProcessPendingFailures(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Checks for any pending failures in the background tasks.

member.name: M:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IQueue.ProcessPendingTasks(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Processes pending tasks in the background queue.
member.returns: A list of the elapsed time for each task with the session context for that task, with the wait time for the current call.
